allow: Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const u=JSON.parse\(d\);u.sort\(\(a,b\)=>b.id-a.id\);u.forEach\(x=>console.log\('  id='+x.id, '|', x.email, '|', x.name, '|', x.role, '|', x.created_at\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const o=JSON.parse\(d\);if\(o.error\){console.log\('✗ LỖI:',o.error.message\);console.log\('Code:',o.error.code,'Status:',o.error.status\)}else{const t=o.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text;console.log\('✓ Gemini OK. Trả lời:',t||'\(rỗng\)'\)}}catch\(e\){console.log\('Parse fail:',d.slice\(0,500\)\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const o=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('Trạng thái backend hiện tại: geminiEnabled =',o.geminiEnabled,'| model =',o.model\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('Backend chưa chạy hoặc lỗi'\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const o=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('Forgot-password response:'\);console.log\('  emailSent:', o.emailSent\);console.log\('  message:', o.message\);if\(o.demo\){console.log\('  demo.resetLink:', o.demo.resetLink\);console.log\('  demo.mailerStatus:', o.demo.mailerStatus\);if\(o.demo.emailError\)console.log\('  emailError:', o.demo.emailError\)}}catch\(e\){console.log\(d.slice\(0,500\)\)}}\)")
